r01.text: They pierce so cleanly and painlessly. In other places my piercings got infected, but here I got eyebrow, lip, and two lobe piercings and everything was very clean. Definitely come; the team's warmth also makes you feel at home 🤍🤍🤍

r02.text: The staff were incredibly kind. I was looking for a hygienic place and this was exactly what I wanted, very clean work. My blood pressure dropped and they helped immediately, I recovered quickly. Seriously, just go here.

r03.text: The most hygienic place you can find in Mersin. Everyone is friendly and warm. If it's your first time and you're scared, they really help you overcome it. Even though I was scared, I got my 5th tattoo done (all 5 at Enki Tattoo :) ). Their hands are very fast and gentle.

r04.text: They work with careful and attentive people. I liked it a lot.

r05.text: Thank you for your effort. I had an old tattoo and you covered it beautifully. You work in a very sterile way. Wishing you great business.

r06.text: Their care and attention are excellent. I had concerns about the design, but I saw such a professional team effort that it was impossible not to leave happy. Special thanks to Mr. Halit and the whole team.

r07.text: Thank you so much for your work. Amazing artists.
